audit: The original Part IV of the notebook only visualizes an aggregated first-layer mask from the baseline model.
No usable deep-model checkpoints existed before Section 8, so a dedicated M3 reference run is needed to compare epochs 0, 1, 5 and 15.
The best Section 6 / Section 7 model family can be reused directly through M3, which keeps Section 8 coherent with the rest of the TP.

protocol.reference_model: M3 / R3 three-stage CNN with dropout and L2

visual_normalization.epoch_evolution: Fixed per-channel scaling across the selected epochs

summary_table.observation: Mean positive ratio 0.464; normalized entropy 0.847; maps remain spatially dense and locally interpretable.
Mean positive ratio decreases from 0.422 to 0.402; entropy decreases from 0.780 to 0.679.
Activation std increases by 0.031 in conv_s1_1 and by 0.303 in conv_s3_2.
